cloud_registry.label: GitHub Pages Demo + Technical Mining RQData A-share

warning_details.message: TA-Lib formulas were source-reviewed; binary output parity was not run because TA-Lib is unavailable on the RQData host.

research_limitations: RQData is the primary data source in this run, so independent vendor cross-validation is not separate.
No transaction cost or limit-up/limit-down execution model is applied.
The six formulas are fixed from the prior mining run; factor direction was not optimized on A-share results.
TA-Lib formulas were reproduced from official definitions, but binary output parity could not be run on the RQData host.
RQData is the sole market-data vendor in this run; independent cross-vendor agreement was not tested.
The long-short portfolio is a research diagnostic; A-share short availability, borrow, and capacity are not modeled.
Limit-up/down sensitivity uses daily close versus limit-price fields when available and is not an execution simulator.
Neutralization covers size, liquidity, and volatility as specified, but not industry exposure.
Behavioral uniqueness is sample-dependent even though source functions, templates, and formulas are structurally unique.
metadata.selection_note: Fifty preregistered TA-Lib source-function replications were added without performance-based formula or direction tuning.
